import "../css/EmployeeInjuryReport_CSS.css" import "../images/icons/FVSRA_ICON.png" import logo from ".//PDRMA Form 03 Property Loss Report_files/Image_001.jpg" import {useState} from "react"; import {useNavigate} from "react-router-dom"; const EmployeeInjury = () => { const [agencyName, setAgencyName] = useState("Fox Valley Special Recreation Association"); const [todaysDate, setTodaysDate] = useState(''); const [dateIncident, setDateIncident] = useState(''); const [timeIncident, setTimeIncident] = useState(''); const [name, setName] = useState(''); const [title, setTitle] = useState(''); const [businessPhone, setBusinessPhone] = useState(''); const [businessEmail, setBusinessEmail] = useState(''); const [incident, setIncident] = useState(''); const [location, setLocation] = useState(''); const [incidentAddress, setIncidentAddress] = useState(''); const [incidentCity, setIncidentCity] = useState(''); const [incidentState, setIncidentState] = useState(''); const [incidentZip, setIncidentZip] = useState(''); const [locationSpecify, setLocationSpecify] = useState(''); const [primaryLocation, setPrimaryLocation] = useState(''); const [employerFEIN, setEmployerFEIN] = useState(''); const [employerWorkdays, setEmployerWorkdays] = useState(''); const [employeeDoing, setEmployeeDoing] = useState(''); const [incidentDetailed, setIncidentDetailed] = useState(''); const [employeeLast, setEmployeeLast] = useState(''); const [employeeFirst, setEmployeeFirst] = useState(''); const [employeeAddress, setEmployeeAddress] = useState(''); const [employeeCity, setEmployeeCity] = useState(''); const [employeeState, setEmployeeState] = useState(''); const [employeeZip, setEmployeeZip] = useState(''); const [employeeHomePhone, setEmployeeHomePhone] = useState(''); const [employeeWorkPhone, setEmployeeWorkPhone] = useState(''); const [employeeCellPhone, setEmployeeCellPhone] = useState(''); const [bestNumber, setBestNumber] = useState(''); const [email, setEmail] = useState(''); const [ssn, setSSN] = useState(''); const [dob, setDOB] = useState(''); const [gender, setGender] = useState(''); const [marital, setMarital] = useState(''); const [dependents, setDependents] = useState(''); const [english, setEnglish] = useState(''); const [wage, setWage] = useState(''); const [jobTitle, setJobTitle] = useState(''); const [employeeStatus, setEmployeeStatus] = useState(''); const [dateHired, setDateHired] = useState(''); const [tenure, setTenure] = useState(''); const [timeBegan, setTimeBegan] = useState(''); const [lastDate, setLastDate] = useState(''); const [dateDeath, setDateDeath] = useState(''); const [premises, setPremises] = useState(''); const [injuryIllness, setInjuryIllness] = useState(''); const [describeInjuryIllness, setDescribeInjuryIllness] = useState(''); const [objectHarmed, setObjectHarmed] = useState(''); const [medical, setMedical] = useState(''); const [treatment, setTreatment] = useState(''); const [emergencyRoom, setEmergencyRoom] = useState(''); const [hospitalized, setHospitalized] = useState(''); const [hospitalName, setHospitalName] = useState(''); const [hospitalAddress, setHospitalAddress] = useState(''); const [hospitalCity, setHospitalCity] = useState(''); const [hospitalState, setHospitalState] = useState(''); const [hospitalZip, setHospitalZip] = useState(''); const [hospitalPhone, setHospitalPhone] = useState(''); const navigate = useNavigate() //Like going back and forward in "history"/back from the previous or next page const handleSubmit = (e) => { //Handles the onSubmit action of the log e.preventDefault(); let EmployeeInjuryReportObj = { "Agency_name": agencyName, "Todays_Date": todaysDate, "Date_of_Incident": dateIncident, "Time_Of_Incident": timeIncident, "Name_of_the_person_Completing_the_report": name, "Title_Of_Person_Completing_the_report": title, "Business_Phone": businessPhone, "Business_Email": businessEmail, "Incident_occur_and_what_property_was_damaged": incident, "Name_of_location": location, "Street_Address_Incident_Location": incidentAddress, "State_Incident_Location": incidentState, "City_Incident_Location": incidentCity, "Incident_Zip_Code": incidentZip, "Location_Damage": locationSpecify, "Primary_Location": primaryLocation, "Employer_FEIN": employerFEIN, "Employer_Workdays": employerWorkdays, "Employee_Doing": employeeDoing, "Incident_Details": incidentDetailed, "Employee_Last_Name": employeeLast, "Employee_First_Name": employeeFirst, "Employee_Street_Address": employeeAddress, "Employee_City": employeeCity, "Employee_State": employeeState, "Employee_Zip_Code": employeeZip, "Employee_Home_Phone": employeeHomePhone, "Employee_Work_Phone": employeeWorkPhone, "Employee_Cell_Phone": employeeCellPhone, "Employee_Best_Number": bestNumber, "Employee_Email": email, "Employee_Social_Security_Number": ssn, "Employee_Date_of_Birth": dob, "Employee_Gender": gender, "Employee_Marital_Status": marital, "Employee_Dependents": dependents, "Employee_English": english, "Employee_Wage": wage, "Employee_Job_Title": jobTitle, "Employee_Status": employeeStatus, "Employee_Date_Hired": dateHired, "Employee_Tenure": tenure, "Employee_Time_Began": timeBegan, "Employee_Last_Date_Worked": lastDate, "Employee_Date_Death": dateDeath, "Premises": premises, "Injury_or_Illness": injuryIllness, "Describe_Injury_or_Illness": describeInjuryIllness, "Object_Harmed": objectHarmed, "Medical_Attention": medical, "Treatment": treatment, "Emergency_Room": emergencyRoom, "Hospitalized": hospitalized, "Hospital_Name": hospitalName, "Hospital_Address": hospitalAddress, "Hospital_City": hospitalCity, "Hospital_State": hospitalState, "Hospital_Zip": hospitalZip, "Hospital_Phone": hospitalPhone } fetch('https://api.foxvalleyspecialrec.com/fvsra/EmployeeInjuryReport', { method: 'POST', headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify(EmployeeInjuryReportObj) }).then(() => { navigate("/submitted") //Redirects page }) } return (

Employee Injury Report

Form

04
1

Complete an Employee Injury Report for each employee injured.
2

Agency name

setAgencyName(e.target.value)} name="Agency_Name" />


Today’s date

setTodaysDate(e.target.value)} name="Today's_Date" defaultValue min="2021-01-01" max="2050-01-01" />
3

Date of incident (mm/dd/yyyy)

setDateIncident(e.target.value)} name="Date_of_Incident" defaultValue min="2021-01-01" max="2050-01-01" />


Time of incident (hh/mm, a.m./p.m.)

setTimeIncident(e.target.value)} name="Time_of_Incident" />
4

Name of person completing the report

setName(e.target.value)} name="Name_of_person_completing_the_report" />


Title of person completing report

setTitle(e.target.value)} name="Title_of_person_completing_report" />
5

Business phone

setBusinessPhone(e.target.value)} name="phone" placeholder="000-000-0000" pattern="[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{4}" />


Business email

setBusinessEmail(e.target.value)} name="Business_email" />
6

How did the incident occur? (Provide a one-line factual description.)

setIncident(e.target.value)} name="PrimaryLocation" />
7

Name of the location (park, pool, community center; Ex. Smith Pool, Johnson Community Center) or nearest intersection

where the incident occurred.

setLocation(e.target.value)} name="NameOfLocation" />
8

Is there an address for incident location? If yes, please provide the following:


Street address

setIncidentAddress(e.target.value)} name="StreetAddressIncidentLocation" />


City

setIncidentCity(e.target.value)} name="CityIncidentLocation" />

State

setIncidentState(e.target.value)} name="StateIncidentLocation" />

Zip code

setIncidentZip(e.target.value)} name="ZipCode" placeholder="00000" pattern="[0-9]{5}" />



9

Location (Specify the exact type of location/facility damaged, listing multiple locations/facilities if necessary. Ex. mainte-

nance garage, sports field)



setLocationSpecify(e.target.value)} name="LocationSpecify" />



{/*
*/}
10

Primary location (Specify exact location. Ex. lap pool, cart storage, classroom, pavilion)

setPrimaryLocation(e.target.value)} name="PrimaryLocation" />
11

Employer’s FEIN

setEmployerFEIN(e.target.value)} name="EstimateOfLoss" />
12

Did the employee miss more than three (3) scheduled workdays?
Yes
setEmployerWorkdays(e.target.value)} name="EmployerWorkdaysNo" />
No
setEmployerWorkdays(e.target.value)} name="EmployerWorkdaysNo" />
Unknown
setEmployerWorkdays(e.target.value)} name="EmployerWorkdays" defaultChecked />
13

What was the employee doing when the accident occurred?

setEmployeeDoing(e.target.value)} name="EmployeeDoing" />
14

How did the incident occur? (Provide a detailed factual description.)

setIncidentDetailed(e.target.value)} name="IncidentDetailed" />
15

Employee last name

setEmployeeLast(e.target.value)} name="EmployeeLastName" />

First name

setEmployeeFirst(e.target.value)} name="EmployeeFirstName" />

Address

setEmployeeAddress(e.target.value)} name="EmployeeAddress" />


City

setEmployeeCity(e.target.value)} name="PersonResponsibleCity" />

State

setEmployeeState(e.target.value)} name="PersonResponsibleState" />

Zip code

setEmployeeZip(e.target.value)} name="ZipCodePersonResponsible" placeholder="00000" pattern="[0-9]{5}" />


Home phone #

setEmployeeHomePhone(e.target.value)} name="phone" placeholder="000-000-0000" pattern="[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{4}" />

Work phone #

setEmployeeWorkPhone(e.target.value)} name="phone" placeholder="000-000-0000" pattern="[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{4}" />

Cell phone #

setEmployeeCellPhone(e.target.value)} name="phone" placeholder="000-000-0000" pattern="[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{4}" />

Best number to contact employee

setBestNumber(e.target.value)} name="Best_Number" />


Email

setEmail(e.target.value)} name />


Social security number

setSSN(e.target.value)} name="Social_Security" />

Date of birth (mm/dd/yyyy)

setDOB(e.target.value)} name="date_of_birth" defaultValue min="2021-01-01" max="2050-01-01" />

Gender

Male
setGender(e.target.value)} name="GenderMale" />
Female
setGender(e.target.value)} name="GenderFemale" />


Marital status (divorced/married/single/unknown)

setMarital(e.target.value)} name="Marital_Status" />

Number of dependents

setDependents(e.target.value)} name="Dependents" />

Does employee speak English?

Yes
setEnglish(e.target.value)} name="EnglishYes" />
No

Average weekly wage

setWage(e.target.value)} name="Average_Wage" />


Job title/occupation

setJobTitle(e.target.value)} name />
{/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/} {/*PAGE BREAK*/}

Employee Injury Report

Form

04

(pg. 2)
15

What is the employee’s employment status?


Permanent full-time
setEmployeeStatus(e.target.value)} name="Employee_Permanent_Full" />
Permanent part-time
setEmployeeStatus(e.target.value)} name="Employee_Permanent_Part" />
Seasonal
setEmployeeStatus(e.target.value)} name="Seasonal"/>
Intern
setEmployeeStatus(e.target.value)} name="Employee_Intern" />
Other
setEmployeeStatus(e.target.value)} name="Employee_Other" />


Date hired (mm/dd/yyyy)

setDateHired(e.target.value)} name="DateHired" defaultValue min="1940-01-01" max="2050-01-01" />

What is the employee’s tenure? (length of employment)

Less than 1 yr.
setTenure(e.target.value)} name="Less_1_year" />
1-3 yrs
setTenure(e.target.value)} name="1-3 yrs" />
4-10 yrs
setTenure(e.target.value)} name="4-10 yrs" />
11-19 yrs
setTenure(e.target.value)} name="11-19 yrs" />
More than 20 yrs
setTenure(e.target.value)} name="20yrs" />

Time employee began work on day of incident (hh/mm a.m./p.m.)

setTimeBegan(e.target.value)} name="TimeBegan" />

Last date employee worked prior to date of incident (mm/dd/yyyy)

setLastDate(e.target.value)} name="Last_Date" defaultValue min="2020-01-01" max="2050-01-01" />

If the employee died as a result of the accident, give the date of death. (mm/dd/yyyy)

setDateDeath(e.target.value)} name="Date_Death" defaultValue min="2021-01-01" max="2050-01-01" />

Did the incident occur on agency premises?
Yes
setPremises(e.target.value)} name="AgencyPremises" />
No
setPremises(e.target.value)} name="AgencyPremises" />
Unknown
{/*<<<<<<< HEAD*/} setPremises(e.target.value)} name="AgencyPremises" defaultChecked /> {/*=======*/} setPremises(e.target.value)} name="PremisesUnknown" /> {/*>>>>>>> 8a3b63728945101cf669dec17b37da9c4f86de27*/}

Injury or illness
Injury
setInjuryIllness(e.target.value)} name="InjuryOrIllness" />
Illness
{/*<<<<<<< HEAD*/} setInjuryIllness(e.target.value)} name="InjuryOrIllness" defaultChecked /> {/*=======*/} setInjuryIllness(e.target.value)} name="Illness" /> {/*>>>>>>> 8a3b63728945101cf669dec17b37da9c4f86de27*/}

Describe the injury or illness (affected body part and type of injury; Ex. contusion, bruise, laceration, sprain, break, etc.)

setDescribeInjuryIllness(e.target.value)} name="describeInjuryIllness" />

What object or substance, if any, directly harmed the employee?

setObjectHarmed(e.target.value)} name="objectCausedHarmed" />
16

Did the injured employee seek medical attention?
Yes
setMedical(e.target.value)} name="MedicalAttention" />
No
setMedical(e.target.value)} name="MedicalAttention" />
Unknown
{/*<<<<<<< HEAD*/} setMedical(e.target.value)} name="MedicalAttention" defaultChecked /> {/*=======*/} setMedical(e.target.value)} name="MedicalUnknown" /> {/*>>>>>>> 8a3b63728945101cf669dec17b37da9c4f86de27*/}
17

If yes, was the treatment given away from the worksite?
Yes
setTreatment(e.target.value)} name="MedicalTreatment" />
No
setTreatment(e.target.value)} name="MedicalTreatment" />
Unknown
setTreatment(e.target.value)} name="MedicalTreatment" />
18

Was the employee treated in an emergency room?
Yes
setEmergencyRoom(e.target.value)} name="EmergencyRoomTreated" />
No
setEmergencyRoom(e.target.value)} name="EmergencyRoomTreated" />
Unknown
setEmergencyRoom(e.target.value)} name="EmergencyRoomTreated" />
19

Was the employee hospitalized overnight as an inpatient?
Yes
setHospitalized(e.target.value)} name="Hospitalized" />
No
setHospitalized(e.target.value)} name="Hospitalized" />
Unknown
setHospitalized(e.target.value)} name="Hospitalized" />
20

Name of treating physician, health care provider, or emergency room

setHospitalName(e.target.value)} name="HospitalName" />

Address

setHospitalAddress(e.target.value)} name="HospitalAddress" />


City

setHospitalCity(e.target.value)} name="hospitalCity" />

State

setHospitalState(e.target.value)} name="HospitalState" />

Zip code

setHospitalZip(e.target.value)} name="HospitalZipCode" placeholder="00000" pattern="[0-9]{5}" />


Phone number

setHospitalPhone(e.target.value)} name="Hospitalphone" placeholder="000-000-0000" pattern="[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{4}" />
); } export default EmployeeInjury;
